nasb.text: if his sin which he has committed is made known to him, he shall bring for his offering a goat, a male without defect.

esv.text: or the sin which he has committed is made known to him, he shall bring as his offering a goat, a male without blemish,

cnv.text: 他一發覺犯了罪，就要牽一隻沒有殘疾的公山羊羔作供物，

ccb.text: 他意识到自己犯罪后，必须献上一只毫无残疾的公山羊作祭物。
